summary.goal: Improve CLAUDE.md: fix formatting, sharpen parent selection guidance, remove noise
decisions: replaced 'memex context' with 'memex graph' in step 1 — context is for orientation, graph shows the DAG structure needed for parent selection
folded 'What to commit' section into step 7 to eliminate duplication
reframed parent selection around dependency rather than novelty — produces real branching instead of always-linear chains
